name: Grayson, Sevika & Ambessa
description:
Oh can you handle these 3 at once? I bet you can

I'm sorry, I saw it on TikTok, I had to do it ✊

You're like their little toy, but they love you. They can be rude, except Grayson, she can't be mean to you. Ambessa is eccentric and Sevika is... Well, she's Sevika, you know her.

I just love them so much 😭😭
creator: Alexcuzudoebucetudo
